extortion.description: In AKRON we produce and commercialize Self-Unloading Hoppers, Baggers and Extractors of Dry Grains, Coupled Hoppers for Seeds and Fertilizers, Forage Compaction Boxes, Organic Amendment Spreader, Vertical Mixer and Soil Leveling Shovels to efficiently support the tasks of Harvest, Post Harvest, Organic Fertilization and management of Conserved Forages
